tiktok.caption: That tip screen isn't asking — it's engineered to extract. Here's the $1,040/year trap most people never see coming.

youtube_short.title: The Tip Screen Is Draining $1,040 From You
title_alternatives: Why Tip Screens Are Engineered to Take Your Money
The Psychology Trick Behind Every Tip Screen
youtube_short.description: Every time that screen spins around at the coffee counter, you're being hit with a psychological system designed to maximize what you pay. Default tip buttons, social pressure timers, and option architecture aren't neutral — they're engineered conversion tools. The average American now tips $1,040 a year, up 53% since 2019, and most people have no idea why. Here's the math, the manipulation, and the simple three-rule fix that saves you over a thousand dollars a year. #tipscreen #tipping #personalfinance #moneyhacks Like and subscribe for daily money psychology breakdowns.

hook_line: That tip screen is engineered to drain $1,040/year from you
